text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text: And now, the moment we've all been waiting for.

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Our Umamusume of the Year! She's the brightest
star of the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
With countless triumphs over her formidable
peers at the G1 level, her talents truly are
befitting of an empress!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text: Air Groove, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beginning with the Shinzan Kinen, Taiki Shuttle
has faced every battle head-on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her achievements are recognized by the
association, and she is presented the award for
best sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the road to becoming Umamusume of
the Year turns out to be far more arduous than we
anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps we should have entered more races. Or
branched out beyond mile races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We gave it our utmost effort... and yet I can't
stop thinking about what else we could have
done.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did ya see what happened at the press
conference?! Air Groove is—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume of the Year, right? Of course I saw!
She really is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Right?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But ya know, this year's lineup was pretty
strong—it could've easily gone to someone else.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's true. There was Grass Wonder in the junior
division, and Mejiro Dober in the classic
division...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention Taiki Shuttle in the sprint division.
Everyone was a powerhouse in their own right.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But... power alone doesn't win you the title of
Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove was just on another level! She tore up
the track like nobody's business!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
She snatched everybody's hearts right outta their
chests to claim the win! So cool...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's the perfect title for someone like me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What the heck are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The year's number one Umamusume, who's
number one in everyone's hearts... No one else
fits the bill but me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, them's fightin' words! Why don't we settle
this on the track?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The top Umamusume in everyone's hearts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't be easy to leave a lasting impression
through sprint and mile races alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return to the track, mulling over those
concerns...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's get runnin', Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I wondered who was trying to bowl me over... I
should have known it was you, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course—I'll be your opponent. Let's have a
good run.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy, Fukukitaru! Let's go running—you and
me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Taiki?! What's this all of a sudden?! I was only
passing by!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Then this must be destiny! Talk about lucky! Now,
let's go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I have to follow Shiraoki's divine message!
"Take it easy this afternoon for good fortu"—wait!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Worked up a good sweat! Now, who should
my next target be...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, I'm outta time! We got ourselves some
training to do, don't we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle is just as energetic—no, more energetic than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But hard work and a positive mindset alone won't
get her any closer to becoming Umamusume of
the Year...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Listen up!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Can ya do me a favor, please?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I want ya to put me in as many G1 sprints and
miles as ya can rustle up.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll be number one in all of 'em—promise!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I ran all those sprints and miles ya recommended
last year, right?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And how was I?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wasn't it exciting? Wasn't I fantastic?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Bet your boots I was! If ya ask me, I think I'm
plenty exciting and fantastic right now too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm gonna win. When it comes to
speed, there ain't no way I can lose!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll get even stronger and faster! More and more
and more!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Til I reach everybody's hearts!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Life is what ya make it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep pushin' forward and carve out my
own path, even if I'm the only one to walk it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And I'll do it with these trusty legs of mine—the
ones you never stopped believing in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who told her that her power and
speed were unparalleled in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And yet...
choice_data_list: (What good am I if I can't trust her?)
(What good am I if I can't trust her?)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So whaddya think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Do ya still believe in me?
choice_data_list:
I believe you'll be the next Umamusume of the
Year!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaaaw! That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer! It's definitely happening next
year...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll make my dream come true! I'm gonna be
Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First things first—we're taking on the Yasuda
Kinen, the race that crowns the spring King of the
Mile!
